Yin Fan Èö±ËïÉ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yin Fan (Èö±ËïÉ)was born in Qingzhou. A false defector to Wu, charmed many people but revolt failed, died bravely. Yin Fan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Wu Kingdom. Yin Fan lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
